mapper.sql: select r.id, r.activity_id, r.activity_candidate_id, r.stat_scope, r.stat_key, r.vote_PASS_count, r.vote_REJECT_count, r.total_votes, r.pass_rate, r.reject_rate, r.rank_no, r.final_result, r.update_at, r.calculated_by, r.calculated_at, ac.import_seq, ac.name as candidate_name, ac.id_card, ac.company, ac.first_level_department, ac.department, ac.third_level_department, ac.position, ac.current_level, ac.applied_level, ac.fixed_type from ResultAgg r left join ActivityCandidate ac on ac.id = r.activity_candidate_id
mapper.select:
and r.activity_id = #{activityId} and r.activity_candidate_id = #{activityCandidateId} and r.stat_scope = #{statScope} and r.stat_key = #{statKey} and r.final_result = #{finalResult} and ac.department = #{department} and ac.applied_level = #{appliedLevel} and ac.fixed_type = #{fixedType}
order by case ac.department when '船体组' then 1 when '船机组' then 2 when '船电组' then 3 when '综合组' then 4 else 99 end asc, ac.department asc, case ac.applied_level when '正高级' then 1 when '正高级工程师' then 1 when '副高级' then 2 when '高级工程师' then 2 when '中级' then 3 when '工程师' then 3 when '初级' then 4 when '助理工程师' then 4 when '员级' then 5 when '技术员' then 5 else 99 end asc, ac.applied_level asc, case when r.rank_no is null then 1 else 0 end asc, r.rank_no asc, ac.import_seq asc, ac.id asc
select count(1) from ResultAgg where activity_id = #{activityId}
select max(calculated_at) from ResultAgg where activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.insert:
insert into ResultAgg(activity_id, activity_candidate_id, stat_scope, stat_key, vote_PASS_count, vote_REJECT_count, total_votes, pass_rate, reject_rate, rank_no, final_result, update_at, calculated_by, calculated_at) values
(#{item.activityId}, #{item.activityCandidateId}, #{item.statScope}, #{item.statKey}, #{item.votePassCount}, #{item.voteRejectCount}, #{item.totalVotes}, #{item.passRate}, #{item.rejectRate}, #{item.rankNo}, #{item.finalResult}, #{item.updateAt}, #{item.calculatedBy}, #{item.calculatedAt})
